raw_consumer_statement: Citi Platinum Credit Card is horrible. I have been in a dispute since XX/XX/year>. Even though I received a phone call in XXXX from the Management assuring me that the dispute had been resolved and I did not owe anything I received a bill TODAY, XX/XX/XXXX, With a much increased bill to {$120.00} instead of {$84.00}. When will this nightmare end?
